meta.title: Writing: Engineering, AI & Security Deep-Dives
meta.description: Technical deep-dives on Node.js internals, AI and LLM engineering, adversarial machine learning, DevOps, and web security - published on Medium and Dev.to.

header.title: Writing on AI, Engineering & Security
header.description: Technical deep-dives on AI-enabled web development, LLM tokenization, Claude Code plugins, MCP servers, Node.js internals, V8, adversarial ML, and web security - featured posts hosted here, full archive on Medium.

posts.title: AI-enabled web development: notes from a year of shipping it
posts.excerpt: I've been shipping what people are now calling 'AI-enabled web development' for about a year - local-first coding agents on top of Ollama, Claude Code plugins, MCP servers wired into real codebases, ONNX models running in the browser. Here's what's worked, what hasn't, and the loops I keep coming back to.

posts.title: From Bytes to BPE: A From-Scratch Tour of LLM Tokenization
posts.excerpt: Building a tokenizer from the ground up - UTF-8 byte streams, character-level encoding, and Byte-Pair Encoding explained through working code.

posts.title: Breaking my own spam classifier: a hands-on tour of adversarial examples
posts.excerpt: Training a spam classifier, then systematically breaking it with perturbed inputs - a hands-on walkthrough of adversarial examples in NLP.

posts.title: How Node.js Handles 10,000 Requests
posts.excerpt: Exploring event-driven architecture, the event loop, and why non-blocking I/O outperforms thread-per-request models.

posts.title: How to Deploy a Basic MERN App on a Linux Server/VPS
posts.excerpt: Step-by-step deployment with Node 22, PM2, Nginx, HTTPS via Certbot, and automated deployment aliases.

posts.title: When Your VPS Gets Hacked: How I Found a Miner Running On Our Server
posts.excerpt: A security incident report - detection, forensics, and hardening after finding xmrig on a compromised VPS.

posts.title: ipconfig in macOS, Linux | Get macOS IP Address
posts.excerpt: Quick reference for finding your IP address across macOS and Linux using ifconfig, ip, and related networking commands.

posts.title: Turn a Phrase into a Strong Password (and Why It Works)
posts.excerpt: Phrase-based password generation combining familiarity with entropy for credentials that are both memorable and secure.

posts.title: Your Digital Keys: Why a Strong Password Is Your First Line of Defense
posts.excerpt: Password security fundamentals - brute-force attacks, dictionary attacks, and supplementary measures like 2FA.

posts.title: Inspect an iPhone Safari Tab from Your Mac (The Clean Way)
posts.excerpt: Remote debugging iOS Safari pages using Mac's Web Inspector - console, elements, network, and breakpoints.

posts.title: Dive into V8: How JavaScript Gets Supercharged (and Sometimes Slows Down)
posts.excerpt: V8 engine internals - parsing, Ignition bytecode, TurboFan compilation, and deoptimization triggers.

posts.title: How ChatGPT-4o Works: A Developer's Dive
posts.excerpt: GPT-4o's multimodal capabilities - native training across text, voice, vision, and real-time latency improvements.

posts.title: How Image Generation Works in ChatGPT (Without the Magic Wand)
posts.excerpt: Text-to-image mechanics - diffusion models, text encoding, iterative denoising, and current limitations.

posts.title: The Ultimate Guide to Autocomplete: Make Your Forms Smarter
posts.excerpt: Leveraging the HTML autocomplete attribute to build smarter, faster forms with zero extra JavaScript.

posts.title: How I Built a Funny Chatbot with ChatGPT and Node.js
posts.excerpt: Express.js meets OpenAI API - building a personality-driven chatbot with system prompt engineering.

posts.title: Play Arcade on a Docker Container
posts.excerpt: Running classic arcade games inside a Docker container - a fun intro to containerization and port mapping.

posts.title: AWS EC2 101 | EC2 Concepts
posts.excerpt: Core EC2 concepts - instance types, AMIs, security groups, and getting started with AWS compute.

posts.title: Get Started with Dockerfile
posts.excerpt: A practical guide to writing Dockerfiles - FROM, RUN, COPY, multi-stage builds, and best practices.

posts.title: Optimize Your JavaScript Code for SEO
posts.excerpt: Techniques for making JavaScript-heavy apps search-engine friendly - SSR, lazy loading, and structured data.

posts.title: Get 100 PageScore for Nuxt Application
posts.excerpt: Achieving a perfect Lighthouse score in Nuxt - image optimization, code splitting, and performance tuning.
